Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('data/demo-snapshot.json', 'utf8'\)\); const o = d.opportunities[0]; console.log\('FIRST OPP:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({id: o.id, urgency: o.urgencyTier, severity: o.severity, triggers: o.triggers, service: o.suggestedService}, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Total opps:', d.opportunities.length\);")

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\rakbop\\OneDrive - John Keells Holdings PLC\\Claude\\legalpulsev2-main\\data\\demo-snapshot.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "OPPORTUNITIES distribution:"; $j.opportunities | Group-Object type | Select Name,Count; "By severity:"; $j.opportunities | Group-Object severity | Select Name,Count; "By urgency:"; $j.opportunities | Group-Object urgencyTier | Select Name,Count; "Entity coverage:"; $j.opportunities | Group-Object entity | Select Name,Count; "PROSPECT NAMES:"; $j.prospects | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\) | $\($_.legalName\)" })
